mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_history(user_id, session_id, role, content, scene_type, order_no, created_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sceneType}, #{orderNo}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.user_id, h.session_id, h.role, h.content, h.scene_type, h.order_no, last_msg.last_active_at AS created_at FROM chat_history h INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MIN(CASE WHEN role = 'USER' THEN id END) AS first_user_msg_id, MAX(created_at) AS last_active_at FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY session_id ) last_msg ON h.id = last_msg.first_user_msg_id ORDER BY last_msg.last_active_at DESC
